Senate

DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
OCEAN RESOURCES
SPORTS
TAXES
WATER MARKETING

DAN MCCORQUODALE
SENATOR
TWELFTH DISTRICT

December 5, 1990


Mark Morodomi, Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95812

Dear Mark:

This letter is to confirm the content of our telephone conversation of
this date.

As you recall, my question had to do with the reporting requirements
and limitations related to a conference held by the Hospital Council of
Northern and Central California that I am to attend on December 6-7,
1990, for educational purposes.

You stated that my attendance is considered a gift and reportable.  You
further stated that there is no limit placed on the amount of the gift.

Please respond to me in writing to the Stanislaus County district office, 1020 15th Street, Suite B, Modesto 95354.

Cordially,

[SIGNATURE]

Heidy Foster
District Representative

HF/kh
